tool.name: GSAS2 Refinement Prototype
tool.command: export GALAXY_WORKING_DIR=`pwd` && mkdir -p /tmp/portal && touch $output && ln -s $gsas_file ./input.gsa && ln -s $prm_file ./input.instprm && #for $index, $cif_file in enumerate($cif_files) ln -s $cif_file ./input_${index}.cif && #end for (cd /GSAS-II/pixi && pixi run python -m gsas2_refinement.gsas2_refinement #for $index, $cif_file in enumerate($cif_files) --cif-filenames "\$GALAXY_WORKING_DIR/input_${index}.cif" #end for --gsas-filename "\$GALAXY_WORKING_DIR/input.gsa" --instrument-params-filename "\$GALAXY_WORKING_DIR/input.instprm" #for $bank in $bank_ids --bank-ids $bank.bank_id #end for --xmin $xmin --xmax $xmax $refine_scale #if $num_cycles is not None --num-cycles $num_cycles #end if #if $scale_factor is not None --scale-factor $scale_factor #end if --output-directory /tmp/portal) && mkdir -p ./portal && cp -R /tmp/portal/. ./portal/ > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2)
